name: archcore
description: Make your AI agent code with your project's architecture, rules, and decisions.

interface.shortDescription: Keep Codex aligned with project decisions and architecture.
interface.longDescription: Archcore brings project architecture, decisions, rules, and requirements into Codex through skills, hooks, MCP tools, and documentation-focused agents.
defaultPrompt: Review this work against Archcore docs
Create an Archcore plan for this change
